LightQuest Player Build
======================
Output setup file: dist\LightQuest-Setup.exe
This build includes game files and runtime DLLs.
Player PC does NOT need SDL2 pre-installed.

Installer lets player choose install directory like typical game setup.
All required SDL runtime DLLs are bundled into installer.

How to install on player PC:
1. Run LightQuest-Setup.exe
2. Choose install location.
3. Launch from desktop/start menu shortcut.

Question file is locked for anti-cheat in release build.
